subscription_plans.name: Classic 3-Month Gin Subscription
subscription_plans.description: Receive one 700–750 ml bottle of Aurora Classic Dry Gin each month for three months, plus digital cocktail recipes.
subscription_plans.includes_description: Includes one flagship bottle per month, tasting notes, and access to exclusive cocktail content.

subscription_plans.name: Explorer 3-Month Gin Flight
subscription_plans.description: Three-month sampler showcasing different Aurora gins each month, including at least one limited release.
subscription_plans.includes_description: Includes one rotating full-size bottle per month, tasting cards, and early access to new releases.

subscription_plans.name: Connoisseur 6-Month Gin Club
subscription_plans.description: Six-month membership with alternating classic and experimental Aurora gins, plus occasional bonus minis.
subscription_plans.includes_description: Includes six shipments, member-only virtual tastings, and priority access to events.

subscription_plans.name: Year of Gin 12-Month Subscription
subscription_plans.description: A full year of Aurora gin deliveries, featuring seasonal releases and exclusive bottlings.
subscription_plans.includes_description: Includes 12 curated bottles, member pricing on additional orders, and VIP distillery event invitations.

products.name: Aurora Classic Dry Gin 700 ml
products.short_description: Flagship classic dry gin with bright citrus, juniper, and a clean, dry finish.
products.long_description: Aurora Classic Dry Gin is the distillery’s flagship expression, built on a backbone of Tuscan juniper, fresh lemon and orange peel, coriander seed, and angelica root. Distilled in small copper pot stills and proofed to a versatile 41.5% ABV, it shines in a simple gin & tonic, Martini, or citrus-forward cocktails.
products.contents_summary: One 700 ml bottle of Aurora Classic Dry Gin.

products.name: Aurora London Dry Gin 700 ml
products.short_description: Classic London Dry gin with crisp juniper and lemon zest.
products.long_description: Aurora London Dry Gin is a traditional, juniper-led style designed for timeless cocktails. A high proportion of juniper, citrus peel, and root botanicals delivers a dry, focused flavor profile that stands up beautifully in G&Ts and highballs.
products.contents_summary: One 700 ml bottle of Aurora London Dry Gin.

products.name: Aurora Oak Rested London Dry Gin 700 ml
products.short_description: London Dry gin lightly rested in oak for added spice and vanilla.
products.long_description: This oak-rested London Dry starts life as a classic juniper-forward gin before resting briefly in used wine barrels. The result is a subtle golden hue with layers of baking spice, vanilla, and toasted oak that complement its citrus and juniper core.
products.contents_summary: One 700 ml bottle of oak-rested London Dry gin.

products.name: Aurora London Dry Reserve Gin 700 ml
products.short_description: Premium London Dry with elevated botanicals for Martini enthusiasts.
products.long_description: Aurora London Dry Reserve Gin amplifies the citrus and spice components of the house style, using an elevated botanical bill and extended distillation cuts for exceptional clarity. Ideal for Martini service and spirit-forward cocktails.
products.contents_summary: One 700 ml bottle of Aurora London Dry Reserve Gin.

products.name: Aurora Botanical Bloom Gin 750 ml
products.short_description: Floral-forward gin with lavender, chamomile, and citrus peel.
products.long_description: Botanical Bloom showcases the softer side of Aurora gin, layering lavender, chamomile, and fresh citrus over a classic juniper backbone. It’s designed for refreshing highballs, spritzes, and modern floral cocktails.
products.contents_summary: One 750 ml bottle of Aurora Botanical Bloom Gin.

products.name: Aurora Citrus Grove Gin 750 ml
products.short_description: Bright citrus gin featuring orange, lemon, and grapefruit peels.
products.long_description: Citrus Grove Gin highlights sun-drenched citrus peels layered over piney juniper and coriander. With notes of sweet orange, zesty lemon, and pink grapefruit, it’s tailor-made for a vibrant gin & tonic or a citrus-led Collins.
products.contents_summary: One 750 ml bottle of Aurora Citrus Grove Gin.

products.name: Aurora Navy Strength Gin 700 ml
products.short_description: Robust navy-strength gin for bold, spirit-forward cocktails.
products.long_description: Aurora Navy Strength Gin packs intense juniper, citrus, and spice at 57% ABV, built for classic cocktails where the gin needs to shine through. Despite its higher proof, careful distillation keeps the palate balanced and surprisingly smooth.
products.contents_summary: One 700 ml bottle of Aurora Navy Strength Gin.

products.name: Aurora Seville Orange Limited Release Gin 700 ml
products.short_description: Limited Seville orange gin with vibrant citrus and gentle spice.
products.long_description: This seasonal limited release celebrates Seville oranges, layering their bittersweet zest over juniper, coriander, and cinnamon. Bottled at 42% ABV, it’s an ideal base for sunny G&Ts and citrus-forward spritzes.
products.contents_summary: One 700 ml limited-edition Seville Orange gin.

products.name: Aurora Barrel Reserve Limited Gin 700 ml
products.short_description: Small-batch barrel-aged gin with notes of vanilla and dried fruit.
products.long_description: A limited run of Aurora gin rested in ex-bourbon barrels for added depth. Expect vanilla, caramel, and dried fruit layered over juniper and baking spice. Bottled at 44% ABV and released once per year.
products.contents_summary: One 700 ml bottle of Aurora Barrel Reserve Limited Gin.

products.name: Aurora Classic Tonic Water 4-Pack
products.short_description: Balanced classic tonic with natural quinine and citrus.
products.long_description: Aurora Classic Tonic Water is lightly bitter with balanced citrus and a fine, persistent carbonation that lets the gin shine. Packed in four 200 ml bottles—perfect for at-home G&Ts.
products.contents_summary: Four 200 ml bottles of classic tonic water (800 ml total).

products.name: Aurora Light Tonic Water 4-Pack
products.short_description: Lower-sugar tonic with a crisp, refreshing finish.
products.long_description: Aurora Light Tonic offers a drier, lower-sugar profile while retaining bright citrus and a clean quinine bite. Ideal for lighter-style G&Ts and spritzes.
products.contents_summary: Four 200 ml bottles of light tonic water (800 ml total).

products.name: Aurora Herbal Tonic Water 4-Pack
products.short_description: Tonic with herbal notes of rosemary and thyme.
products.long_description: Aurora Herbal Tonic layers rosemary, thyme, and citrus over a classic tonic base, creating a savory, refreshing mixer that pairs beautifully with citrus and navy-strength gins.
products.contents_summary: Four 200 ml bottles of herbal tonic water (800 ml total).

products.name: Aurora Dried Lemon Slices
products.short_description: Dried lemon wheel garnishes for bright, zesty G&Ts.
products.long_description: Thinly sliced lemons, gently dried to preserve color and aroma. Add a single wheel to a gin & tonic or highball for a consistent citrus lift.
products.contents_summary: Jar of dried lemon slices (approx. 20–25 slices).

products.name: Aurora Dried Orange Wheels
products.short_description: Sun-dried orange wheels ideal for citrus gin cocktails.
products.long_description: Vibrant dried orange wheels that provide color and a bittersweet citrus aroma. Perfect with Seville Orange and other citrus-led gins.
products.contents_summary: Jar of dried orange wheels (approx. 18–22 slices).

products.name: Aurora Whole Juniper Berries
products.short_description: Dried juniper berries for boosting botanical aroma.
products.long_description: Top your G&Ts and stirred gin cocktails with a few whole juniper berries to amplify piney, resinous aromatics. Sourced to match the botanicals used in Aurora gins.
products.contents_summary: Reusable jar filled with whole juniper berries.

products.name: Aurora Premium Client Tasting Gift Set
products.short_description: Premium gift set with 3 mini gins and 2 engraved glasses.
products.long_description: Designed for client gifting and special occasions, this premium set includes three 50 ml miniatures (Classic Dry, Botanical Bloom, and Citrus Grove), two engraved Aurora tasting glasses, and a garnish sampler featuring dried citrus and juniper berries.
products.contents_summary: 3×50 ml mini Aurora gins, 2 tasting glasses, garnish sampler.

products.name: Aurora Mini Duo & Glassware Gift Set
products.short_description: Gift set with 2 mini gins and 2 Aurora G&T glasses.
products.long_description: A compact gift set featuring two 50 ml mini bottles (Classic Dry and London Dry) alongside a pair of Aurora-branded gin & tonic glasses, presented in a keepsake box.
products.contents_summary: 2×50 ml mini gins and 2 G&T glasses in a gift box.

products.name: Aurora Gin & Tonic Starter Bundle
products.short_description: Starter bundle with flagship gin, tonic, and garnish.
products.long_description: Everything you need for your first Aurora gin & tonic night: one 700 ml bottle of Aurora Classic Dry Gin, one 4-pack of Classic Tonic Water, and a jar of Dried Lemon Slices, bundled at a savings compared to buying items separately.
products.contents_summary: Flagship gin (700 ml), Classic Tonic 4-pack, Dried Lemon Slices.

products.name: Classic 3-Month Gin Subscription
products.short_description: Three-month prepaid subscription featuring Aurora Classic Dry Gin.
products.long_description: Each month for three months, receive a 700–750 ml bottle of Aurora Classic Dry Gin delivered to your door, along with digital tasting notes and cocktail recipes. This product corresponds to the Classic 3-Month Gin Subscription plan.
products.contents_summary: Prepaid 3-month gin subscription (one full-size bottle per month).

products.name: Twilight Distillery Tour & Tasting Flight Ticket
products.short_description: Evening distillery tour with guided tasting flight.
products.long_description: This ticket admits one guest to the Twilight Distillery Tour & Tasting Flight experience at the Aurora Gin Distillery in Portland, OR. Includes a guided walkthrough of the production floor and a seated tasting of four gins.
products.contents_summary: Admission for one to the Twilight Distillery Tour & Tasting Flight.

products.name: Afternoon Gin Tasting Flight Ticket
products.short_description: Seated afternoon tasting of five Aurora gins.
products.long_description: This ticket grants one guest access to the Afternoon Gin Tasting Flight in the Aurora tasting room, featuring five gins with guided notes from a host. Ideal as a relaxed introduction to the range.
products.contents_summary: Admission for one to the Afternoon Gin Tasting Flight.

cocktail_recipes.name: Flagship Citrus Gin & Tonic
cocktail_recipes.description: A bright, classic gin & tonic built around Aurora Classic Dry Gin with layered fresh and dried citrus.
cocktail_recipes.instructions:
Fill a highball glass with ice.
Add Aurora Classic Dry Gin.
Top with chilled classic tonic water and gently stir once.
Squeeze a fresh lime wedge over the drink and drop it in.
Garnish with one dried lemon slice and serve immediately.

cocktail_recipes.name: Aurora Classic Dry Martini
cocktail_recipes.description: A clean, spirit-forward Martini showcasing Aurora Classic Dry Gin.
cocktail_recipes.instructions:
Chill a coupe or Martini glass with ice and water.
In a mixing glass, combine Aurora Classic Dry Gin and dry vermouth.
Fill with ice and stir for 20–30 seconds until well chilled.
Dump the ice water from the chilled glass and strain the cocktail into it.
Express a lemon twist over the surface, then drop it in as garnish.

cocktail_recipes.name: Citrus Grove Collins
cocktail_recipes.description: A tall, effervescent Collins built on Aurora Citrus Grove Gin with lemon and grapefruit.
cocktail_recipes.instructions:
Add Aurora Citrus Grove Gin, lemon juice, and simple syrup to a shaker.
Fill with ice and shake briefly until chilled.
Strain into an ice-filled Collins glass.
Top with chilled soda water and gently stir.
Garnish with a dried orange wheel and a fresh grapefruit wedge.

cocktail_recipes.name: Botanical Bloom Garden Highball
cocktail_recipes.description: A floral, refreshing highball pairing Aurora Botanical Bloom Gin with light tonic and lemon.
cocktail_recipes.instructions:
Fill a highball glass with ice.
Add Aurora Botanical Bloom Gin and a squeeze of lemon juice.
Top with Aurora Light Tonic Water and gently stir.
Garnish with a dried lemon slice and a sprig of fresh thyme.

cocktail_recipes.name: Seville Sunset Gin & Tonic
cocktail_recipes.description: A bittersweet orange-forward G&T featuring Aurora Seville Orange Limited Release Gin.
cocktail_recipes.instructions:
Build in a balloon or Copa glass filled with ice.
Add Aurora Seville Orange Gin.
Top with Aurora Herbal Tonic Water and stir gently.
Garnish with a dried orange wheel and a strip of orange peel expressed over the drink.

ingredients.name: Aurora Seville Orange Limited Release Gin

cocktail_recipes.name: Navy & Herbal Tonic
cocktail_recipes.description: A robust navy-strength G&T tamed with aromatic herbal tonic and juniper garnish.
cocktail_recipes.instructions:
Fill a rocks or double Old Fashioned glass with large ice cubes.
Add Aurora Navy Strength Gin.
Top with Aurora Herbal Tonic Water and stir once or twice.
Garnish with a dried orange wheel and a few juniper berries.

cocktail_recipes.name: Flagship Gin Sour
cocktail_recipes.description: A silky citrus gin sour highlighting Aurora Classic Dry Gin.
cocktail_recipes.instructions:
Add Aurora Classic Dry Gin, lemon juice, simple syrup, and egg white (if using) to a shaker without ice.
Dry shake vigorously for 10 seconds.
Add ice and shake again until well chilled and frothy.
Double strain into a chilled coupe.
Garnish with a dried lemon slice or a few drops of bitters.

cocktail_recipes.name: Classic Gin Rickey
cocktail_recipes.description: A no-sugar highball with bright lime and sparkling water built on Aurora London Dry or Classic Dry Gin.
cocktail_recipes.instructions:
Fill a highball glass with ice.
Add Aurora Classic Dry Gin or Aurora London Dry Gin.
Squeeze in the juice of half a lime, dropping the spent shell into the glass.
Top with chilled soda water and give a brief stir.

cocktail_recipes.name: London Dry Reserve Martini
cocktail_recipes.description: A luxurious Martini built with Aurora London Dry Reserve Gin and a juniper garnish.
cocktail_recipes.instructions:
Stir Aurora London Dry Reserve Gin with a small measure of dry vermouth over ice until thoroughly chilled.
Strain into a chilled Nick & Nora or coupe glass.
Garnish with three juniper berries on a cocktail pick.

cocktail_recipes.name: Barrel Reserve Gin Old Fashioned
cocktail_recipes.description: A rich, aromatic Old Fashioned riff using Aurora Barrel Reserve Limited Gin.
cocktail_recipes.instructions:
In a mixing glass, combine Aurora Barrel Reserve Limited Gin, rich simple syrup, and bitters.
Add ice and stir until well chilled and slightly diluted.
Strain over a large ice cube in a rocks glass.
Express an orange peel over the drink, then place it in the glass along with a dried orange wheel.

cocktail_recipes.name: Aurora Rooftop Spritz
cocktail_recipes.description: A light and bubbly spritz combining Citrus Grove Gin, light tonic, and sparkling wine.
cocktail_recipes.instructions:
Build directly in a large wine glass filled with ice.
Add Aurora Citrus Grove Gin and sparkling wine.
Top with Aurora Light Tonic Water.
Briefly stir to combine and garnish with a dried orange wheel and lemon slice.

cocktail_recipes.name: Classic Gin & Tonic Pitcher
cocktail_recipes.description: A simple make-ahead G&T pitcher ideal for entertaining, featuring Aurora Classic Dry Gin and Classic Tonic.
cocktail_recipes.instructions:
In a chilled pitcher, combine Aurora Classic Dry Gin and chilled Classic Tonic Water.
Add plenty of ice and gently stir.
Add lime wheels and dried lemon slices directly to the pitcher.
Serve into ice-filled glasses, ensuring each glass gets some citrus garnish.

cocktail_recipes.name: Afternoon Tasting Room Highball
cocktail_recipes.description: A simple highball inspired by the distillery tasting flight, using Aurora London Dry Gin and Classic Tonic.
cocktail_recipes.instructions:
Fill a Collins glass with ice.
Add Aurora London Dry Gin.
Top with Aurora Classic Tonic Water and gently stir.
Garnish with a dried lemon slice and a single juniper berry.

cocktail_recipes.name: Quick Flagship Citrus Smash
cocktail_recipes.description: A fast, muddled citrus gin cocktail using Aurora Classic Dry Gin, lemon, and orange.
cocktail_recipes.instructions:
In a shaker, muddle lemon wedges and a small orange wedge with simple syrup.
Add Aurora Classic Dry Gin and fill the shaker with ice.
Shake until well chilled, then fine strain into an ice-filled rocks glass.
Garnish with a dried orange wheel and a dried lemon slice.
